reviews.comment:
Te hacen dificil pagar con app YPf con factura A. Tratan que no lo hagas y te dicen que no se puede. Hay que insistir y lo aceptan pero la complican y te miran con cara de que les molesta. Siendo socio del ACA no me gusta vivir esto cada vez que cargo. 2 veces x semana.

(Translated by Google)
They make it difficult to pay with the YPF app using an A-type invoice. They try to prevent it and tell you it's not possible. You have to insist, and they accept it, but they complicate things and look at you with annoyance. As an ACA member, I don't like experiencing this every time I fill up. Twice a week.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXNnNtUE1nEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy bien ubicada.
Un montón de surtidores.
Y la atención es destacable, siempre con buena onda

(Translated by Google)
Excellent location.
Plenty of gas stations.
And the service is outstanding, always friendly.

reviews.comment:
Correcto lástima que últimamente cada día se tarda más para cargar nafta , todo muy lento y eso que había pocos autos

(Translated by Google)
That's right, it's a shame that lately it takes longer and longer to fill up with gas, everything is very slow, even though there were few cars.

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención de su personal, tanto de playeras/os y los chicos de full, el lugar siempre impecable y muy traqui para tomarte un café.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the staff, both the beach boys and girls, the place is always spotless and very quiet to have a coffee.

reviews.comment:
Excelente estación de servicio con varios ingresos y bastante lugar para estacionar, el agua caliente es gratis, pero para inflar los neumáticos tiene costo antes era gratis 🛞, lo baños súper limpios 👍🏻

(Translated by Google)
Excellent gas station with several entrances and plenty of parking. Hot water is free, but inflating tires costs money; it used to be free 🛞. The bathrooms are super clean 👍🏻
